PowerShell(cd E:\\theburyproject1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --configuration Release --urls http://localhost:5187" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; $response = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5187" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "UP" } catch { "DOWN: $_" }; Write-Host $response)

PowerShell(cd E:\\theburyproject1; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location E:\\theburyproject1; dotnet run --configuration Release --urls "http://localhost:5187" 2>&1 }; Write-Host "Job ID: $\($job.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 35; $response = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5187" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "UP" } catch { "DOWN" }; Write-Host "App status: $response"; Receive-Job $job -Keep | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(cd E:\\theburyproject1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "E:\\theburyproject1\\bin\\Release\\net8.0\\TheBuryProyect.dll --urls http://localhost:5187" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\theburyproject1" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; $response = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5187" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "DOWN: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host $response)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTEN" | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split '\\s+'; $pid2 = $parts[-1]; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc -and $proc.Name -eq "dotnet"\) { "$_  -> dotnet PID $pid2" } })
